steps.title: Apply FOIL to expand the binomial product
steps.content:
Use FOIL (First, Outer, Inner, Last) on $(w + 7)(3w - 10)$:
  • First: $w \cdot 3w = 3w^2$
  • Outer: $w \cdot (-10) = -10w$
  • Inner: $7 \cdot 3w = 21w$
  • Last: $7 \cdot (-10) = -70$
This gives us $3w^2 - 10w + 21w - 70$.

steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content:
The middle terms are $-10w$ and $21w$. Adding them: $-10w + 21w = 11w$.
The expanded form is $3w^2 + 11w - 70$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
